response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title 'ぼくらのレットイットビー' (Bokura no Let-it-Be) and artist '計測器' from on-screen text. Performed a search for the song, which clarified the artist as HarryP. Used this information to find the lyrics in Japanese and English. Separated the video into two scenes: the dialogue intro and the song performance.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a conversation between three characters in a space-like setting around a campfire, which lasts for approximately 50 seconds. Then, two of the characters (Ayunda Risu and Airani Iofifteen) perform a song together in the same setting for the remainder of the video.

scenes.description: Characters are sitting around a campfire in a space-like setting, engaging in conversation.
Ayunda Risu and Airani Iofifteen perform the song 'Bokura no Let-it-Be' in the space setting. The title and credit appear at the bottom.
scenes.song_title: ぼくらのレットイットビー (Bokura no Let-it-Be)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 生まれ変われるのなら 目印になるから 巻いておこう\n小指と小指の長い糸 ほどけない様に 結んどこう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: If I could be reborn, I'd leave a sign so I'd be found\nSo let's tie our pinky fingers together with a long thread, so it won't come undone.
